<!--
This template is for raw requests. The agent will read your description, propose
how to break it down or structure it, and post a "triage proposal" comment.
Review the proposal, edit it directly if you want changes, then apply the
`agent:approved` label to have the agent execute it.

For well-structured tasks, use the "Agent Task" template instead — those skip
triage and go straight to coding.
-->

## What I want

<!-- Describe in plain language what you'd like done. The agent will figure out the structure. -->



## Why / context

<!-- Optional but helpful: business reason, customer ask, related work, anything that helps scope it correctly. -->



## Constraints I know of

<!-- Optional. Things that should/shouldn't happen. -->
